whatItDoes: Newtonsoft.Json is a high-performance JSON framework for .NET. It provides flexible JSON serialization and deserialization, LINQ-to-JSON, JSON Path, and XML-to-JSON conversion.
compatibility: Compatible with .NET Framework 4.5+, .NET Standard 1.0/2.0, and .NET 6/7/8. Works on Mono, Xamarin, and Unity.
versionAdvice: Use 13.x for latest features and performance improvements. The library is stable and actively maintained. No deprecation planned.
